title: Lily of the Dust
writer: Paul Bern, Edward Sheldon, Hermann Sudermann
actors: Pola Negri, Ben Lyon, Noah Beery
plot: An innocent young librarian, Lily, catches the eye of several officers in a German garrison, and although one of the, Lieutenant Prell, is particularly attracted to her, she marries Colonel Mertzbach, the aristocratic regimental c...
